tagline: Dive into the smoky, seductive world of 'Push It On Me'.
liner: Step inside a late-night French Touch sanctuary where intimacy and desire take center stage. This track captures the sultry atmosphere of a dimly lit club, driven by warm analog basslines that pulse beneath filtered disco loops. Sultry female vocals, chopped into hypnotic fragments, guide you through a journey from whispered anticipation to full surrender in the drop. The music wraps around you like smoke, inviting you to keep the feeling alive while side-chained pads swell and fall. It is an invitation to lose yourself in the rhythm of the night.
worldCaption: A smoky French Touch deep house world where filtered disco loops meet warm analog basslines for a seductive late-night trance experience.

bios.lead: Whispers secrets through glitched hooks that never fade away.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking with relentless, hypnotic rhythms.
bios.bass: Drives the intimate vibe like a warm analog heartbeat.
bios.synth: Weaves side-chained pads into layers of sultry atmosphere.
bios.other: Adds atmospheric depth to every shadow and silence.
